projectDescription: A Convex component that integrates Better Auth with Convex, providing authentication, social sign-on, multi-factor authentication, and session management for React and full-stack applications.
keyFeatures: Convex component integration with Better Auth
Social sign-on (GitHub, Google, Discord, Twitter, and more)
Transactional triggers for auth data changes
Framework support: React, Next.js, TanStack Start, SvelteKit, Expo
Local install option for full schema control
Static JWKS for optimized token validation
publicApiSurface: createClient() - Create component client for Convex+BetterAuth integration
createApi() - Create adapter API functions for local install
convexAdapter - Convex database adapter for Better Auth
AuthBoundary - React component for auth error boundary
convex() - Server plugin for Better Auth
convexClient() - Client plugin for Better Auth
getAuthConfigProvider() - Get Convex auth config provider
requireActionCtx() - Type guard for action context
requireRunMutationCtx() - Type guard for mutation/action context
authComponent.getAuth(createAuth, ctx) - Get auth instance with headers
authComponent.getAnyUserById(ctx, id) - Get user by ID
authComponent.registerRoutesLazy(http, createAuth) - Lazy HTTP route registration
